game.title: The Downside
game.short_text: Your World Turned Upside Down

details.title: The Downside
details.description:
This is my submission to the  BlackThornProd Game Jam #3 (Theme: Less is More)
NOTE: Lag may be an issue depending on your browser and hardware configuration. If you are experiencing lag in the browser please feel free to download the game and play.
Source: https://github.com/MrBundles/blackthornprod_gamejam_3
A World-Bending Puzzle Platformer in a Minimalistic Art Style
PLEASE CHECK OUT THE GAME MODE DESCRIPTIONS BELOW

- Controls -
Move with Arrow Keys / WASD
Left Click - Turn your world upside down
Right Click - Remove nearby blocks
Reset - "R"
Pause - Click on the Player

- Use of Theme -
The game is primarily based on a "World-Swap" mechanic. When you click on a nearby block, all empty space in the level becomes solid ground and all solid ground becomes empty space.
The other main mechanic of the game is the ability to "dig" or remove nearby blocks. However, all that empty space created when you dig will become solid ground whenever you swap the world.
Thus, the LESS tiles in the current world the MORE tiles you will have in the swapped world.
Hopefully this makes more sense in the context of the game :D

*PRACTICE MODE*
The game is quite challenging in some of the later levels. Please make use of the practice mode if you are struggling on a particular level. Practice mode can be enabled from the settings menu or from the pause menu
The player is invincible when practice mode is enabled

*SPEEDRUN MODE*
Once you beat all of the levels you will unlock speedrun mode in which the controls are tweaked for faster gameplay and the best individual and summed times are shown in the level select screen

*HARDCORE MODE*
If you can achieve a sum-of-best-times less than 5 minutes you will unlock hardcore mode in which you can play a whole new set of MUCH more difficult levels

Hope you enjoy the game, Feedback is MUCH appreciated!
Please let me know if you find any game-breaking bugs or issues with the downloads so I can make note of it in the game description.

- Known Issues -
-There are some minor audio glitches when transitioning between screens in the web web build of the game
-In Hardcore mode the player may glitch out of the level on spawn. Press "R" to reset if this happens.

game.title: Froggy´s Quest
game.short_text: Will you be able to burglarice the Queens Castle and scape alive?

details.title: Froggy´s Quest
details.description:
Will you be able to enter the Queen Tortoise's castle and get out alive?
IMPORTANT, PLEASE READ: The idea is to go after the treasures that weight less and have more value, that way you will be able to still move freely and outrun the snakes. The treasures values and weight can be checked in the trophies room. THANKS.
DESCRIPTION
You impersonate a greedy thief  frog who is trying to steal as much  treasures as he can from the castle. But since he is little, the more he takes, the harder it is to move around.
You will have to hide from the fierceful guards who will pursue you if they see or hear you wandering around. You will have to sneak around so the snakes don't find you and most of all... do not wake the Queen!
Will you manage to get all the trophies?

MECHANICS
- Explore the castle to find all the trophies
- The more weight you carry, the slower you will go
- If you run, the guards will here you from further distance
- You can throw the carried trophies away to run faster, but the snakes will catch them and you will lose them forever
- Use your tongue to get the trophies you can't reach
- Once you have the score that you need, you will have to get out without being caught

THEME
Less is more - this game was entirely made for the Blackthornprod GAME JAM #3 (https://itch.io/jam/blackthornprod-game-jam-3). The topic of the jam was "Less is More". For our team, this game is a perfect example of this topic since the more you carry, the harder it is to get out alive (with forcess you to grab a less amount of treasures, but finding greater values). All the art, music and source was made from scratch for this jam.

TEAM, CREDITS AND CONTACT
Sergio Woodprint (IG: @sergio_woodprint) - Artist
David Chico (IG: @_davidchico) - Programmer and Artist
David Lledó (IG: @againdav) - Programmer
Alberto Raya (IG: @albertorayamusic) - Soundtrack composer and Sound effects
The font of the game is taken from https://www.cufonfonts.com/font/spooky-cat

THANKS! We hope you enjoy it!

game.title: Garbage Cleanup Software
game.short_text: Remove grabage files in order to free up space. Less files equals more space. Made for the blackthornprod game jam #3.

details.title: Garbage Cleanup Software
details.description:
It seems like your computer is running out of memory... There is only one way to fix this. Remove useless garbage stored on your computer! The less files the more storage space!
In this game you'll play as a garbage cleanup software and remove garbage stored on the computer. This game is fully playable with a mouse and doesn't need any other components to work! Except maybe a working computer connected to the internet...
How do you remove the files? Just simply left click when your character is on top of one to remove it. But some files have special abilities and will make your life a little harder and sometimes the files will be very useful and give you special powers for a little while.
This game was made in 7 days for the blackthornprod game jam #3. https://itch.io/jam/blackthornprod-game-jam-3

game.title: Strength Quest
game.short_text: Simple RogueLite game with cards (Entry for Blackthornprod GAME JAM #3)

details.title: Strength Quest
details.description:
Strength Quest is a small roguelite card game made for the BlackThornProd Game Jam #3. The theme was "less is more", I've always wanted to make card games and it was the perfect time to do it.
To fit the theme I've implemented a strength multiplier : the more health you have the less damage you deal. You have to find the right balance between health and damage, don't be too greedy !

No WebGL build, I'm sorry I tried to make it work but the UI is scaling really bad and I can't understand why it's so complicated to get working the webgl on Unity.

Known Issues : 
- The card behaviour is weird sometimes, it's the best I can do without rewriting the whole script from scratch.
- Sometimes the cards can become smaller and smaller, I didn't had this problem with my 1080p monitor, a quick fix can be to play in 1920x1080.Extract the .zip file wherever you want.
Windows : open "Strength Quest.exe"
Mac : open "Strength Quest.app"
Linux : sorry I don't know :/

game.title: minimalist mastery
game.short_text: a narrative puzzle game about minimalism and art

details.title: minimalist mastery
details.description:
About
It's the 1950s/1960s and you're an up and coming artist. Although you've gotten praise for your more traditional and classical works, you feel as though you need to make something new, something... bold. Thus, you decide to pursue a minimalistic style in order to make the art that you wish to see.

Game Jam
Minimalist Mastery was made for the BlackThornProd #3 game jam. 
This game was ranked...
#3 for THEME
#8 for MUSIC
#42 for DESIGN
#57 for OVERALL
out of 1,100 submissions!
The theme for this game jam was less is more which I decided to take in 2 ways:
It is a "design by subtraction" as you remove shapes from a painting in order to create the final pieceIt is a story about minimalism, an art form that is all about abstract expressionism and how less is more to make good pieces of art


Windows, Mac & Linux Download
Go below to download these versions of the game. They're all updated so they're the same as the play in browser version :)

Credits
Art, Code & Music  - arkicade
Music - purpleplanet
SFX - zapsplat

game.title: Rage
game.short_text: The less hearts you have, the more powerful you are!

details.title: Rage
details.description:
The less hearts you have, the more powerful you are! The idea was  inspired by the 'rage' mechanic is Super Smash Bros. Can you make it to the end and get 3 stars in every level?
Here's a tip if you're struggling: At 0 health you still have 1 second to live and your sword has no cooldown. It might be tempting to keep all your lives and circle around the enemies, but this is slow and won't work for enemies with regeneration. Remember, LESS IS MORE! The ideal strategy is to eventually get to 0 lives to be at max power and finish off the monsters in your 1 second time limit. Your lives reset each level so don't worry about low health, just worry about beating each level!You can also check the video on the right to see how I beat them.
-------------------------------------
Controls: 
WASD or Arrow Keys to move
Mouse to aim
Left Click to attack
-------------------------------------
For Blackthornprod's 3rd Game Jame. Everything made by me.

You're a pirate in a race to treasure island. Alas, you'll never beat the other ships with all this extra cargo. Why not gift the competition some of that cargo to lighten the load and go faster. Hoist the sails, ya sea dog, there's a race to be won!
Controls
Left click to launch a cargo chest
A, D (Arrow keys, Numpad 4,6) to turn left and right 
Q, E to look around
Jam
Lesser Acts of Piracy was create for the Blackthornprod Game Jam #3, with the theme 'Less is More'. The game is about getting less cargo to gain more speed, and win the race. And compete against the AI trying to do the same.

details.title: Pug's Coco Island
details.description:
Build your coconut business in a small island, from the ground up!(Note: Crafting is not yet 100% available, but feel free to explore and play around the island.)

Gameplay
Gather materials from one source - the Coconut Tree, and use that to craft items or construct mechanisms to create and sell your mama's specialty - CocoDrops! A sweet snack that you enjoyed as a young pug.
Game design and gameplay were inspired by games like:
Animal CrossingOvercookedThis War of MineCities: Skylinesand of course, Harvest Moon.
Controls
Keyboard:
WASD - MovementSHIFT (hold) - SprintE - InteractCTRL (hold) - CrouchESC - Pause Menu

Gamepad:
Left Stick - Movement
Right Shoulder Button (hold) - Sprint
A Button - Interact
Left Shoulder Button (hold) - Crouch
Start Button - Pause Menu


Misc Info
Concept and prototype were created within 7 days for BTP Game Jam 3 with the theme "Less is More."All graphic assets were done from scratch, sound effects were from previous projects, while the music I used were from free-to-use sources.This game is currently on hold with version 0.3.1 as the latest update.Consider following if you'd like to see more of this game, I would greatly appreciate your support! ❤

game.short_text: Thy Mension is a simple game where you play as a 2D and 3D character at once.

details.title: Thy Mension
details.description:
Thy Mension is the game I made for the BlackThornProd Game Jam. It is a very simplistic 2D/3D game where you control both the 2D and 3D caharcters at once. I thought this idea was really cool so I hope you enjoy it.
Controls:
2D character:
 A, D or arrow keys to move left and right.
Space Bar to jump and twice to double jump.
Wall climbing/ sliding is available.
3D character:
W, A, S, D or arrow keys to move.
I hope you like it!

game.title: Duck? Duck? Goose!
game.short_text: Physics Platform Prototype

details.title: Duck? Duck? Goose!
details.description:
Small prototype for a physics platformer created for the Blackthornprod Game Jam #3Checkpoints: This game was not intended to be played with checkpoints, but I did add them in, stand by them for about 2 seconds and they will turn green, pressing R or falling into the void will move you back to that checkpoint. If you want a full reset press T.
Controls:A or <-  :  Rotate Counter clock wise (Only while big)D or ->  : Rotate Clock wise (Only while big)Hold Space : Compress to small state (Accelerates)Release Space : Decompress to big state (Jump)R : Restart From Last CheckpointT : Restart From StartEsc: Quit
Theme: Less is MoreInterpretation: Smaller is Faster
Team: Just Me
Tips, if you are having trouble:
Take it slowly, some parts require speed, some parts require slowing downFor the first part, roll down as small then jump and the rotate left while big in air to make the jump safelyFor the big ramp part, mid-way in, start rolling as big from that start of the platform and then turn into small when you see that vertical wall right below you.
Third Party Assets Used: Music: Dusk by Eric Matyas - www.soundimage.org

moreInfo.Rating: Rated 4.0 out of 5 stars(6 total ratings)
moreInfo.Author: Nasheik

game.title: KeyKey
game.short_text: #RespectTheKeys #JustOneKey

details.title: KeyKey
details.description:
WHAT IS THIS ALL ABOUT?
The escape key of your keyboard is angry with you. You've been mistreating the keys on your keyboard all this time.  KEY EXPLOITER!!!
    
For this reason you can only use one key for playing this game. 
    
You must try to type as many letters as possible with your chosen key avoiding getting hurt. Hold the key to charge your wave bomb and delete some of the letters, but try not to press the key for too long or it will explode. Keep writting to get more wave bombs. 

Try playing with keys of all kinds between games and find out what Escape has to say!!!




WHAT IS SUPPOSED TO BE DONE?
Type as many characters as possible. Hold to type characters continuously.Hold to avoid being hurted by the writtten characters.Hold until reaching the "BOMB" sign and release to launch the wave bomb. Type characters to recharge your bomb again.Switch key between games and discover all the diferent comments that Escape got for you ;) . (Numbers, letters, Caps Lock, ...).
This is something that I should have explained better in the game, but I realised this too late, so I hope this advice helps someone. Also, in PC version you can switch it from windowed to full screen pressing Alt+Enter.
WHAT HAVE I DONE?
All programming, design and artwork has been done by Picodaddy (Me :) ) except for:
Font: Coolvetica.Music: "Bluesy Vibes".Sounds: Various sources, but mostly from Kenney.nl. Then I edited them with Audacity.
This game participated in the #3 BlackthornProd Game Jam (my first jam :D)with the theme "Less is more". I have focused it on design by subtraction, so here you have a game controlled by just one key. It is also present in the Lore, so the less you use the keys the happier they are.
This game finally ranked 33rd out of more than a thousand games participating, and 3rd in terms of innovation. I am very proud that my first jam went so well and I want to thank all the people who gave me feedback and support. Thank you all very much :D !!!!Unzip the file and execute "KeyKey.exe".

game.title: A Small Amount of Infinite Space
game.short_text: Rooms are small, but repeat infinitely.

details.title: A Small Amount of Infinite Space
details.description:
Short game for the Blackthornprod Game Jam #3, with the theme "Less is More."
In this game, the levels are all quite small, but repeat infinitely. So, somehow less is literally more here.Download, unzip and run "A Small Amount of Infinite Space" exe file.
I think the game will only work on Windows, but I'm not sure.

game.title: Microvania
game.short_text: A cute one-screen metroidvania

details.title: Microvania
details.description: The theme for Blackthornprod Game Jam #3 was "Less is more", so I challenged myself to make a metroidvania on only one screen, and with a palette of only 4 colors. The result is a this cute little puzzle platformer, where each new powerup recontextualizes the space you are navigating. Then, at the end, you have to put all the powerups back, which is a wholly unique challenge as you have to figure out which order they must be returned in, you can't just do it in reverse order. I had a lot of fun making it, and I hope you enjoy it too!Please download and unzip the folder, then open the html file to play.

moreInfo.Rating: Rated 4.4 out of 5 stars(7 total ratings)
moreInfo.Author: Isaac Games

game.title: Ghost Frame 1D
game.short_text: 1-Dimensional Ghost Hunting Adventure

details.title: Ghost Frame 1D
details.description:
Explore the lakeside manor to find your missing friend Ashley!
Made for Blackthornprod Game Jam with theme "Less is More".
This game is an experimental 1-D riff on Fatal Frame.  I decided for the "Less is More" theme to approach it with the idea of "fewer spatial dimensions means you have to use your imagination more". Normally, this concept applies with 2D games, but I thought it might be fun to take things one step further. Unfortunately, I only had the weekend to do any work on this and I found quickly that there was more potential here than I had time to deliver on in that time. Consider this a proof of concept. Leave a comment if you'd like to see this expanded it. Maybe I'll revisit it sometime after my current side-project, although I'll probably try to riff on Faith by Airdorf instead if I try the whole 1-D horror thing again.
---------------
Controls
---------------
-Move: Left/Right Arrow Keys or A/D Keys
-Use Camera: Z or Space
-Open Doors: Z or Space
---------------
Options
---------------
The menu icons from left to right:
-Turn off lighting
-Reduce height of game line
-Stretch height of game line
---------------
Mechanics
---------------
-Ghosts will take more damage and knockback if they are closer to you
-A dialog will play once all ghosts are cleared in a room
-Locked doors can be opened if you find corresponding keys

game.title: Slimestone Quarry
game.short_text: Slimes can merge together to solve puzzles in this 3D platformer!

details.title: Slimestone Quarry
details.description:
Slimes do best where its cold, wet, and miserable! Solve puzzles as slimes that can combine together and split apart, and try and reach the bottom of Slimestone Quarry! This is an easy-going platformer game meant to be completed in one sitting, made for the Blackthornprod Gamejam #3 in a week. The theme of Less is More, you can make Less overall slimes by combining them, but the combined slimes are More useful. If you tried it, let me know what you thought with a comment!
______________________________
Controls:
Z to switch between slimesSPACEBAR to split slimesESC for pause menu(pause to restart the level if you messed up!)
______________________________
Credits:
Art, Coding, Music, Sounds: pipotchi (me)
______________________________
To fulfil the theme, I went with multiple weak slimes that could combine. The less units you control, the stronger and heavier they are.

game.title: Enemy Control
game.short_text: Control the enemy position to reach your goal

details.title: Enemy Control
details.description:
Enemy Control is a puzzle game about movement.
Your goal is to manipulate the enemy position to reach the door.

I choose this mechanic because is very connected to the theme and it provides a naturally balanced design for the game. More enemies provide more danger for the player but at the same time give more opportunities to use them for movement.
I'm very happy with the results, the game is fun to play, but I have a lot of problems with balance in the level design. Until now I don't know if the levels are too easy or hard.
I hope you enjoyed the game! :)



---- spoiler alert! ----
If you have trouble with some level you can use the m key to jump to the next level or use the n key to return to previous level.
------------------------

If you like my games you can follow me at https://twitter.com/CreationalLabs

game.title: Don't Wake the Dragon
game.short_text: Stealth game in a randomly generated dungeon

details.title: Don't Wake the Dragon
details.description:
Get ready for a dangerous adventure in a randomly generated dungeon where you can get rich or die by your greed.
Your goal is to sneak into the treasury guarded by a sleeping dragon and steal as much treasures as you can carry.Be careful not to make any noise because when the dragon notices you, the only solution is to run away - and it may be hard to run with a bag full of treasures.Consider that sometimes taking fewer treasures can save you from death, so in this game quite often LESS IS MORE.
made for Blackthornprod Gamejam 3

NOTE:
If you got "Windows protected your PC etc" message, just click 'more info' > 'Run' and you will be able to run the game normally.

game.short_text: Command your special operations agent to victory through your tactical view.

details.title: F.O.X. Agent
details.description:
Embark on a dangerous mission as F.O.X. Agent deep behind enemy lines.
Your objective is to complete each mission using stealth and strategy with as few engagements as possible, as these will increase the awareness of all enemies, making your mission much more difficult.
Remember, less is more! Think twice before shooting.

Don't forget to let us know what you thought about it in the comments. We'd love to hear your feedback.
Thanks a bunch for your interest in our game! We hope you enjoy it!

game.title: FireFly Less is More
game.short_text: Arcade nature game

details.title: FireFly Less is More
details.description:
This is my submission for the BlackThornProd Game Jam #3 Less is More. I went with a nature type game where you are a Firefly that losses light and energy from pollinating flowers. The lower the light bar is the more points, and more bat enemies.
Hover over the question mark for controls
Move: W, A, S, D
Follow the target indicator to locate the flowers and Press and Hold "X"
Avoid the bats
The less light and energy the more score points and bats

game.title: The Night Keeper
game.short_text: Night falls in The Garden, only the Keeper remains.

details.title: The Night Keeper
details.description:
The Night Keeper
Night falls in The Garden, only the Keeper remains.
All music, art, and code, original work created for this game, were made during the BlackThornProd  #3 Game Jam. January 2021!
Controls:
WASD or Arrow Keys to move
SPACE to turn on and off your lantern

Night falls in The Garden, just like it does at the end of every day, just like it has done for as long as we can remember.
In the evening, when the Visitors have gone, only the groundskeeper remains. He has one more job before he can rest.
He must travel the Garden one last time, extinguishing every light that keeps the dark away.
He’s done it his whole life, for as long as he can remember.
But somehow, each night is different. As the darkness closes in, new paths are revealed, new… friends… appear, and even after all this time, the journey towards darkness is never easy.

game.title: Overboard
game.short_text: Your ship is sinking! Survive as long as you can by throwing your cargo overboard!

details.title: Overboard
details.description:
Oh no, your ship is sinking and the only way to stay afloat is to throw your cargo overboard! But it's not that easy, there's a pesky squid putting your cargo back! How long can you survive before your boat sinks? 
(Made in 7 days for BTP Game Jam #3)
How to play:
Press left click to pickup/drop cargo

Press right click to throw cargo

Cannons are too heavy to pickup, walk into them to push them!

Watch out for the squid that will throw your cargo back! If you want to survive you'll have to be efficient!

game.title: The Weak Knight's Feat
game.short_text: 1-bit puzzle dungeon crawler where your attacks get less and less powerful!

details.title: The Weak Knight's Feat
details.description:
You're known in the village as the weak youngster. Nobody believes in your strength. You decide to prove everyone wrong and travel to the infamous Haunted Dungeon, where the dead are alive. Big treasures are told to lay there. Will you be able to retrieve them?
Done in 7 days for the Blackthornprod GAME JAM #3! This is my second completed project and it's immensely more complex than my previous one.
The theme of the jam was "less is more": I incorporated the theme by making a puzzle dungeon crawler where for every attack you do, you get less damage for your next attack. All assets (art, scripts, music, sound effects) created by me.
Controls:
WASD or arrow keys to move/attack 
Estimated playthrough time: 5-10 minutes.
An immense thank you goes to Jun for helping me in the programming phase and for making me learn a lot of new things (btw check his game that was featured on Newgrounds, it's insanely good: MAD SISTERS' WEEK OFF!!! (newgrounds.com) )

moreInfo.Author: DaSquid
moreInfo.Tags: 1-bit, Cute, Dungeon Crawler, Pixel Art, Short
